startDate.description: The contract start date of the employee. This will be locked once an employee has been paid and cannot be changed (YYYY-MM-DD)

publicKey.description: The public key of the contract. Public key is required if the intention is to edit an existing contract. If no key is supplied a new contract will be created

isFixedTerm.description: describes whether the contract is fixed term (required if trying to create Fixed term contract)

fixedTermEndDate.description: The fixed term end date of the employee. Not required if isFixedTerm is false or not provided (required if trying to create Fixed term contract)
